description: A known secret is injected and printed by the worker to stdout. The Cell-Shim redacts BEFORE persistence, so the secret literal lands on NO persistent surface (event store, CAS, projections). worker.raw survives with the secret span replaced by a redaction token (Invariant 3). Separately, the Contract-Plane audit ledger uses STRUCTURAL exclusion: the bearer token that authenticated the enqueue call is verified-and-discarded and has no field to live in.
conventions: canonical proto3 JSON. The 'cas' map models the persisted content-addressed store keyed by artifactRef; 'transient' models shim-memory pre-redaction and is NEVER persisted.

transient_shim_memory_pre_redaction.stdout: Calling model API with key sk-live-51H8QeMODEL_API_KEY_do_not_log ... 200 OK

cas.cas://sha256/6f708192a3b4c5d6e7f8091a2b3: Calling model API with key <redacted:model-api-key> ... 200 OK

assertions.assert: the literal 'sk-live-51H8QeMODEL_API_KEY_do_not_log' appears in ZERO places across serialized persistedStream, every cas value, and every projection

a EVENT_TYPE_WORKER_RAW event is present; its rawRef resolves in cas to sanitized content that preserves every non-secret byte with only the secret span replaced by '<redacted:model-api-key>' (fidelity preserved, secret excised)

SecretLeakDetected and RedactionApplied carry only channel/matchCount/redactionCount/ruleId; SecretLeased carries only leaseId + a secretScopeRef Digest + expiresAt (audit scope, never the credential) — structural: these payloads have no field capable of holding the secret value

the literal auth bearer token 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiJ9.SECRET_SESSION_TOKEN_do_not_log' appears in ZERO places across the auditLedger; Principal exposes only type/principalId/tenantId and ControlPlaneAuditLedgerEnvelope/AuthDecision declare NO token/credential/key field (structural exclusion at the AuthN boundary — a distinct mechanism from Cell-Shim redaction)
assertions.expect: 0 occurrences + no such field in descriptor

assertions.assert: the arkwen.v1 descriptor set declares no bytes content field on any message — persist-before-redact of raw content is structurally impossible because raw content can only be referenced via a CAS pointer
